metaDescription: Veteran-owned barber shop in San Clemente. Precision cuts, military fades, straight razor shaves, gentleman's cuts, women's haircuts, color, and custom designs. Walk-ins welcome at 1006 S. El Camino Real, Suite A.

hero.subtitle: With over 30 years of experience, A Cut Above Barber Shop specializes in military cuts, modern styles, and detailed grooming for men and women, delivered with consistency, care, and attention to detail every visit.
hero.cardQuote: Sit back, relax, and leave sharp, confident, and refreshed.

whyUs.heading: A clean, modern shop with three decades of craft.
whyUs.intro: We're San Clemente's veteran-owned barber shop. Every cut is delivered with consistency, care, and attention to detail in a space designed for you to relax, refresh, and recharge.

cards.title: Veteran-owned
cards.body: Owned by a military veteran and surviving spouse, proudly serving service members from every branch and the broader San Clemente community.

cards.title: Precision craft
cards.body: Straight razor fades, lineups, beard work, and detailed designs from barbers with decades of combined experience.

cards.title: For everyone
cards.body: Men, women, and kids. Military regulation cuts, gentleman's classics, modern styles, and color services.

cards.title: Welcoming space
cards.body: Complimentary shampoo and drinks. A clean, modern shop where you're a guest, not a number.

servicesPreview.heading: A full menu of barber and hair services.

barbersPreview.heading: Meet your barbers.
barbersPreview.intro: Each barber has their own specialty so you can choose the right fit for your style.

visit.heading: Right on El Camino Real in San Clemente.
visit.intro: Easy to find, easy to park. Walk-ins are welcome, and same-day appointments are often available. Call or text to lock in your barber.
